creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
Look at ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/FAQ-ru.tar.gz
That is russian translation (in sgml) of FAQ, sync with 11.11.98
That document ready for incorporation to main doc tree, but need
some care with Makefiles, I think. I guess Andrey Chernov can
help with this.

Fix: 

Try to incorporate that in main doc tree.
